vultr.cloud.account_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr account
vultr.cloud.account_info.description: Get infos about account balance, charges and payments.

vultr.cloud.bare_metal.short_description: Manages bare metal machines on Vultr.
vultr.cloud.bare_metal.description: Manage bare metal machines on Vultr.

label.description: Name of the bare metal machine.

hostname.description: The hostname to assign to this bare metal machine.

os.description: The operating system name. Mutually exclusive with I(image) and I(app).

app.description: The app deploy name of Vultr OneClick apps. Mutually exclusive with I(image) and I(os).

image.description: The image deploy name of Vultr Marketplace apps. Mutually exclusive with I(os) and I(app).

plan.description: The plan name to use for the bare metal machine. Required if the bare metal machine does not yet exist.

activation_email.description: Whether to send an activation email when the bare metal machine is ready or not. Only considered on creation.

mdisk_mode.description: Multi-disk operating mode of the bare metal server. If C(none), leaves all non-OS disks unformatted. If C(jbod) (Just a Bunch Of Disks), formats and mounts all non-OS disks. If C(raid1), creates the instance with the OS disk configured in a software RAID1. The C(raid1) choice is not applicable for Windows OS.

persistent_pxe.description: Whether to enable persistent PXE or not.

enable_ipv6.description: Whether to enable IPv6 or not.

tags.description: Tags for the bare metal machine.

user_data.description: User data to be passed to the bare metal machine.

startup_script.description: Name or ID of the startup script to execute on boot. Only considered while creating the bare metal machine.

ssh_keys.description: List of SSH key names passed to the bare metal machine on creation.

snapshot.description: Description or ID of the snapshot. Only considered while creating the bare metal machine.

reserved_ipv4.description: IP address of the floating IP to use as the main IP of this bare metal machine. Only considered on creation.

region.description: Region the bare metal machine is deployed into.

vpc2s.description: A list of VPCs (VPC 2.0) identified by their description to be assigned to the bare metal machine.

skip_wait.description: Whether to skip the wait for the instance to be completely ready for access.

state.description: State of the bare metal machine.

vultr.cloud.block_storage.short_description: Manages block storage volumes on Vultr

label.description: Name of the block storage volume.

size_gb.description: Size of the block storage volume in GB. Required if I(state) is present. If it is larger than the volume's current size, the volume will be resized.

block_type.description: The type of block storage volume that will be created.

region.description: Region the block storage volume is deployed into. Required if I(state) is present.

state.description: State of the block storage volume.

attached_to_instance.description: The ID of the server instance the volume is attached to.

live.description: Whether the volume should be attached/detached without restarting the instance.

vultr.cloud.block_storage_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr block storage
vultr.cloud.block_storage_info.description: Get infos about block storages available.

ip.description: The default server IP. Use M(vultr.cloud.dns_record) to change it once the domain is created. Required if C(state=present).

dns_sec.description: Ensure DNSSEC is enabled or disabled.

vultr.cloud.dns_domain_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr DNS domains
vultr.cloud.dns_domain_info.description: Gather information about DNS domains available.

vultr.cloud.dns_record.description: Create, update and remove DNS records.

domain.description: The domain the record is related to.

data.description: Data of the record. Required if C(state=present).

multiple.description: Whether to use more than one record with similar I(name) including no name and I(type). Only allowed for a few record types, e.g. C(type=A), C(type=NS) or C(type=MX). I(data) will not be updated, instead it is used as a key to find existing records.

vultr.cloud.firewall_group_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr firewall groups
vultr.cloud.firewall_group_info.description: Gather information about firewall groups available.

subnet.description: The network or IP, e.g. 192.0.2.123 or 0.0.0.0. Mutally exclusive with I(source).

subnet_size.description: The number of bits for the netmask in CIDR notation, e.g. C(32).

port.description: Single port or port range, e.g. C(80) or C(8000:8080). Required if I(protocol) is tcp or udp and I(state=present).

source.description: Possible values are C(cloudflare) or a loadbalancer label. Mutally exclusive with I(subnet).

vultr.cloud.firewall_rule_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr firewall rules
vultr.cloud.firewall_rule_info.description: Gather information about firewall rules available.

hostname.description: The hostname to assign to this instance.

os.description: The operating system name. Mutually exclusive with I(image) and I(app).

app.description: The app deploy name of Vultr OneClick apps. Mutually exclusive with I(image) and I(os).

image.description: The image deploy name of Vultr Marketplace apps. Mutually exclusive with I(os) and I(app).

firewall_group.description: The firewall group description to assign this instance to.

plan.description: The plan name to use for the instance. Required if the instance does not yet exist.

activation_email.description: Whether to send an activation email when the instance is ready or not. Only considered on creation.

backups.description: Whether to enable automatic backups or not.

ddos_protection.description: Whether to enable ddos_protection or not.

enable_ipv6.description: Whether to enable IPv6 or not.

user_data.description: User data to be passed to the instance.

user_scheme.description: The user scheme used as login user (Linux-only). By default, the I(root) user is configured. Only considered while creating the instance.

startup_script.description: Name or ID of the startup script to execute on boot. Only considered while creating the instance.

ssh_keys.description: List of SSH key names passed to the instance on creation.

snapshot.description: Description or ID of the snapshot. Only considered while creating the instance.

reserved_ipv4.description: IP address of the floating IP to use as the main IP of this instance. Only considered on creation.

region.description: Region the instance is deployed into.

vpcs.description: A list of VPCs identified by their description to be assigned to the instance.

skip_wait.description: Whether to skip the wait for the instance to be completely ready for access.

state.description: State of the instance. The state I(reinstalled) was added in version 1.8.0.

vultr.cloud.instance_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr instances

vultr.cloud.load_balancer.description: Create, update, or delete load balancers on Vultr.

label.description: The label for your Load Balancer.

region.description: Region where the load balancer will be created.

forwarding_rules.description: An array of forwarding rule objects.

ssl_redirect.description: If true, this will redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS. You must have an HTTPS rule and SSL certificate installed on the load balancer to enable this option.

http2.description: If true, this will enable HTTP2 traffic. You must have an HTTPS forwarding rule combo (HTTPS -> HTTPS) to enable this option.

http3.description: If true, this will enable HTTP3/QUIC traffic. You must have HTTP2 enabled.

nodes.description: The number of nodes to add to the load balancer (1-99), must be an odd number. Defaults to 1.

timeout.description: The maximum time allowed for the connection to remain inactive before timing out in seconds. Defaults to 600.

proxy_protocol.description: If true, you must configure backend nodes to accept Proxy protocol.

sticky_session.description: Enables sticky sessions for your load balancer when a cookie_name is provided.

instances.description: Array of Instance IDs to attach to this Load Balancer. Instances will be attached or detached to match your array.

vpc.description: ID of the VPC you wish to use. If omitted, defaults to the public network.

firewall_rules.description: An array of firewall rule objects.

auto_ssl.description: The Auto SSL configuration. Must be using Vultr DNS for Auto SSL.

global_regions.description: Array of Region ids to deploy child Load Balancers to.

vultr.cloud.load_balancer_info.short_description: Get information about Vultr load balancers
vultr.cloud.load_balancer_info.description: Retrieve details about load balancers on Vultr.

cluster.description: Cluster hostname where the object storage will be created.

tier.description: Name of storage tier to use for object storage. Must be available for specified cluster. Required if I(state) is present.

vultr.cloud.object_storage_cluster_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr object storage clusters
vultr.cloud.object_storage_cluster_info.description: Get infos about object storage clusters available.

vultr.cloud.object_storage_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr object stores
vultr.cloud.object_storage_info.description: Get infos about object storages available.

vultr.cloud.os_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr operation systems
vultr.cloud.os_info.description: Get infos about operating systems available to boot servers.

vultr.cloud.plan_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr plans
vultr.cloud.plan_info.description: Gather information about plans available to boot servers.

vultr.cloud.plan_metal_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr bare metal plans
vultr.cloud.plan_metal_info.description: Gather information about plans available to boot servers.

vultr.cloud.region_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr regions
vultr.cloud.region_info.description: Gather information about regions available to boot servers.

vultr.cloud.reserved_ip.description: Create, attach, detach and remove reserved IPs.

instance_name.description: Name of the Instance the reserved IP should be attached to. Mutually exclusive with I(instance_id).

instance_id.description: ID of the Instance the reserved IP should be attached to. Mutually exclusive with I(instance_name).

region.description: Region of the reserved IP will be related to.

instance.description: The description or ID of the instance from which to take the snapshot. Mutually exclusive with I(url). I(instance) or I(url) is required if I(state=present).

uefi.description: Whether or not the snapshot uses UEFI. Only considered on creation when I(url) is provided.

url.description: The URL of the snapshot image (RAW) to be uploaded. Mutually exclusive with I(instance). I(instance) or I(url) is required if I(state=present).

vultr.cloud.snapshot_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr snapshots

vultr.cloud.ssh_key.description: Create, update and remove ssh keys.

ssh_key.description: SSH public key. Required if C(state=present).

vultr.cloud.ssh_key_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr SSH keys
vultr.cloud.ssh_key_info.description: Get infos about SSH keys available.

vultr.cloud.startup_script.description: Create, update and remove startup scripts.

type.description: The script type, can not be changed once created.

script.description: The script source code. Required if I(state=present).

vultr.cloud.startup_script_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr startup scripts
vultr.cloud.startup_script_info.description: Gather information about startup scripts available.

email.description: Email of the user. Required if C(state=present).

password.description: Password of the user. Only considered while creating a user or when C(force=true).

force.description: Password will only be changed with enforcement.

api_enabled.description: Whether the API is enabled or not.

acls.description: List of ACLs this users should have. Required if C(state=present). One or more of the choices list, some depend on each other.

vultr.cloud.user_info.short_description: Get information about the Vultr users

v4_subnet.description: IPv4 subnet of the VPC. Required if I(state=present).

v4_subnet_mask.description: IPv4 subnet mask of the VPC. Required if I(state=present).

region.description: Region the VPC will be related to. Required if I(state=present).

ip_type.description: Type of the IP version. Required if I(state=present).

ip_block.description: The subnet of the VPC. Required if I(state=present).

prefix_length.description: The number of bits for the netmask in CIDR notation, e.g. 24. Required if I(state=present).

region.description: Region the VPC will be related to. Required if I(state=present).

vultr.cloud.vpc2_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr VPCs 2.0

vultr.cloud.vpc_info.short_description: Gather information about the Vultr VPCs
